name: Create Product Brief Workflow
description: Create a strategic product brief document with vision, problem statement, target users, and success metrics.

steps.description: Conduct market research and competitive analysis
steps.exit_criteria: Market context and competitive landscape documented

steps.description: Brainstorm product ideas and value propositions
steps.exit_criteria: Key ideas and value propositions identified
Product brief with vision, problem, users, and metrics complete

steps.description: Validate and refine the product brief
steps.exit_criteria: Product brief approved by product owner

success_criteria: Complete product brief ready for PRD creation
